displayName: Favorite folders and files - Register favorite folders and files
description:
Register favorite folders and files to provide quick access to them. Shortcuts:
WINDOWS+BACKSPACE: Open favorite folders dialog..
SHIFT+WINDOWS+BACKSPACE: Open favorite files dialog.
changelog:
Set compatibility with NVDA 2026.1;
Added Chai Chaimee work for favorite files.
